channel.title: Perplexity Hub
channel.description: Perplexity Hub — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: How Perplexity Builds Accuracy into Frontier AI
item.description: Our central focus has always been to build accuracy into frontier AI. For the first time, we’re sharing some of the technology behind how we do that.

item.title: Computer at Work
item.description: Last month, we launched Computer for Enterprise. At Ask NYC 2026, our inaugural enterprise conference, we shared what

item.title: Computer in Teams is here
item.description: Perplexity brings AI orchestration to Microsoft Teams for analysis, creation, and workflows where work happens

item.title: Announcing Premium Health Sources
item.description: Today we are launching Premium Health Sources. This continues our investment in premium sources and will allow Perplexity to draw from the same clinical references used by physicians and researchers.

item.title: Computer for Professional Finance
item.description: Today we are launching Perplexity Computer for Professional Finance, a version of Computer built for the research, analysis, and decision workflows finance teams run every day.
